artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery did not locate a dedicated Donghua University-wide generative-AI policy. The staged run uses one official Donghua news source for a narrow AI/source-status claim about AIGC training and journal rules, and one official Information Disclosure PDF for academic-misconduct procedure claims. Duplicate list and republished-news pages were rejected as non-primary evidence.

artifacts.claimText: Donghua University's official news page reports that a March 2024 AI research-support and integrity activity covered reasonable application of AI tools in thesis work, and says Donghua University journals had published AIGC-use rules covering author details and investigation methods.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Official news reports AI thesis-use training and journal AIGC-use rules; no university-wide GenAI policy located in this crawl.

artifacts.claimText: Donghua University's 2024 academic-misconduct implementation rules define academic misconduct as conduct by current faculty, staff, and students in scientific research and related activities that violates recognized academic standards and academic integrity.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Academic misconduct scope covers current faculty, staff, and students in research-related activities.

citation.citationTitle: 东华大学学术不端行为处理实施细则（东华研〔2024〕1号）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Donghua University's 2024 rules assign the school academic committee or its authorized committee to decide whether a reported academic-misconduct matter enters formal investigation, and say formal investigations use an investigation group of at least three people.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Formal academic-misconduct investigation requires committee decision and at least three investigators.

citation.citationTitle: 东华大学学术不端行为处理实施细则（东华研〔2024〕1号）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Donghua University's 2024 academic-misconduct rules state that students found to have academic misconduct can be handled under the university student discipline rules, with possible additional consequences including delayed degree conferral, denial of degree, or lawful revocation of degree.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Student academic-misconduct consequences may include disciplinary handling and degree-related consequences.

artifacts.sourceTitle: AI助研 诚信共建——大学生毕业季知网课堂校园行全国首站在校启动
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 知网培训服务专家现场围绕大学生毕业论文选题、开题、撰写、答辩、科研规范与学术诚信，以及AI工具的合理应用等方面展开速训。技术向善要他律更要自律。《东华大学学报（自然科学版）》《东华大学学报（社会科学版）》等刊在去年底公布了对于AIGC技术使用的有关规定，其中不仅涉及了作者要遵守的细则，也提出了查处方式。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The official news item says training covered reasonable AI-tool application in thesis work, research norms and academic integrity, and that Donghua journals had published AIGC-use rules covering author details and investigation methods.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Body paragraphs beginning 毕业论文是检验大学生学习成果的关键节点 and 技术向善要他律更要自律

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第十一条 学术不端行为举报受理后，交由校学术委员会或其授权下属专门委员会作出是否进入正式调查的决定。第十三条 校学术委员会或其授权下属专门委员会组成不少于3人的调查组，对被举报行为进行调查。

artifacts.title: Donghua University staged AI and academic-integrity source review
artifacts.summary: This staged run found no dedicated Donghua University-wide generative-AI policy in official-domain searches. It stages one narrow source-status claim from an official Donghua news item about AI research-support, thesis-use training, and journal AIGC-use rules, plus three academic-integrity procedure claims from the official 2024 Donghua academic-misconduct implementation-rules PDF.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Official-source searches did not locate a dedicated Donghua University-wide generative-AI policy; the AI-related claim is scoped to the official news item and journal-rule/source-status wording.
The academic-misconduct PDF supports academic-integrity procedure claims, not a generative-AI-specific rule.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
